sentinel_2_msi.hint: Pull 'Level-2A' for Bottom-of-Atmosphere (BOA) reflectance; ignores haze.

landsat_8_9_oli.hint: Use B10 Thermal for 'Spine Locking' steel hulls. Night passes are best for contrast.

sentinel_1_c_band.hint: Use 'VV' polarization for oil sheen detection in choppy water.

icesat_2_atl13.source: NSIDC (National Snow and Ice Data Center)
icesat_2_atl13.best_use: Inland Water Bathymetry / Clear Spot validation
icesat_2_atl13.hint: Look for 'strong beam' hits that penetrate deeper than the surrounding lake floor.

swot.hint: Best for detecting the 'dome' effect over massive 14,000-ton wrecks.
